title: 30 Pcs Blue Satin Ribbon Bows, Self-Adhesive Mini Blue Bows for Gift Wrapping, Pre-Tied Bow Craft, Sewing, Scrapbooking, Wedding Gift Christmas Birthday Party Decoration, Hair Bows for Girls Baby
features: Elegant Satin Texture: Crafted from smooth satin ribbon, each blue bow offers a refined, soft sheen that brings a delicate and stylish finish to gift wrapping, crafts, or festive packaging.
Adhesive and Hassle-Free: Pre-tied with self-adhesive gel pads, these mini bows make decorating easier—just peel and stick to elevate cards, treat bags, or party favours in seconds.
Versatile Craft Accessory: From birthday party décor to wedding invitations, these blue ribbon bows suit various occasions and crafts, including scrapbooking, sewing, and small gift wrapping.
Baby Blue and Beautiful: Featuring a soft baby blue hue, these mini bows add a charming touch to baby showers, handmade hair clips, or blue-themed decorations without overpowering your design.
Practical 30-Pack Value: This set includes 30 self-adhesive bows, ideal for small business packaging, DIY projects, or anyone who enjoys crafting with ribbon bows for special moments.
description: Product Description Self-Adhesive Mini Blue Bows for Gift Wrapping Pre-Tied Bow Craft Sewing Scrapbooking Wedding Gift Christmas Birthday Party Decoration Soft Blue Satin Finish : These bows feature a gentle baby blue hue with a smooth satin sheen, offering a delicate and versatile decorative accent. The soothing colour works beautifully for baby showers, weddings, and seasonal decorations while maintaining a soft, elegant appeal.
